title: Why Cruise Line Stocks Dropped Today
text: The conflict in Eastern Europe is hurting cruise line stocks today.

title: SILVERSEA CHRISTENS SILVER ORIGIN® WITH EXPEDITION-INSPIRED CEREMONY IN THE GALÁPAGOS ISLANDS
text: MONACO, Feb. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  View and download images and videos from Silver Origin's naming ceremony. Leading ultra-luxury cruise line, Silversea Cruises, christened Silver Origin on February 25, 2022, during an expedition-inspired ceremony in San Cristobal, the Galápagos Islands.

title: SILVERSEA® UNVEILS NEW SUITES DEBUTING ON SILVER NOVA(SM) TO MARK NEW ERA IN ULTRA-LUXURY, SUSTAINABLE TRAVEL
text: MONACO, Feb. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Silversea Cruises® unveils details of its highly anticipated collection of suites set to debut on Silver NovaSM  in Summer 2023. With 364 suites across 13 categories, Silver Nova – the first vessel in the cruise line's Nova class – will feature an entirely new design approach for the leading ultra-luxury cruise line, with an asymmetrical configuration and horizontal layout introducing a new generation of suites.

title: Earnings Previews: Alibaba, Discovery, Newmont, Nikola, Norwegian Cruise Lines
text: Markets were closed Monday in observance of Presidents Day. Even so, a couple of intrepid energy companies chose to report results when no one was around to hear them.

title: Even as Royal Caribbean Cruisers Return, It Remains More of a Trade
text: Royal Caribbean needs the world to return to normal by next year at the earliest. If it does, the cruise line and RCL stock holders can make a profit.

title: Why Royal Caribbean, Carnival, and Norwegian Cruise Stocks Popped Today

title: Truist's Patrick Scholes explains why he's dovish on the cruise stocks
text: Carnival, Norwegian, and Royal Caribbean stocks have recovered roughly 20% each since last week, but Truist Securities' Patrick Scholes continues to see them as “not” a smart pick for 2022. title: SILVERSEA'S FLAGSHIP SILVER NOVA(SM) TAKES DISCERNING TRAVELLERS TO NEW HORIZONS ON 71-DAY GRAND VOYAGE TO SOUTH AMERICA
text: MONACO, Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Silversea Cruises® launches its all-new  71-day Grand Voyage  to Central and South America aboard Silversea's latest ship Silver NovaSM . Setting sail on January 4, 2024, Silversea's guests will journey deep into 38 destinations in 18 countries, travelling in the luxury cruise line's trademark level of service aboard the soon-to-be-launched Silver Nova.

title: Cruise stock surge toward the top of the S&P 500's gainers list
text: Cruise stocks surged Monday, and were among the biggest gainers in the S&P 500 SPX, -0.13% , in the wake of Royal Caribbean Group's RCL, +6.97% earnings report in which the cruise operator Chief Executive Jason Liberty said "we are past COVID." Shares of Royal Caribbean's ran up 6.9% in midday trading, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.

title: Earnings Results: Royal Caribbean pushes back timing of being cash flow positive by a few months, but CEO believes ‘we are past COVID'
text: Shares of Royal Caribbean Group dropped Friday, after the cruise operator reported quarterly results that missed analyst expectations, again, and pushed back by a few months when it expects to stop its cash drain.

title: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Stock Down on Q4 Earnings & Revenue Miss
text: Royal Caribbean's (RCL) fourth-quarter 2021 top line increased year over year owing to the resumption of cruise operations.

title: Royal Caribbean Stock Falls On Q4 Miss; Expects Profitability In 2H'22
text: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd RCL  reported fourth-quarter FY21 sales of $982.25 million, missing the analyst consensus of $1.04 billion. The passenger ticket revenue for the quarter amounted to $617.4 million.

title: Royal Caribbean's Miss Isn't a Surprise
text: Royal Caribbean misses Wall Street forecasts and delays its return to profitability. It could be worse.

title: Royal Caribbean Pushes Back Profitability Forecast Amid Omicron. Shares Are Down.
text: CEO Jason Liberty said in a release Friday morning that “we expect 2022 will be a strong transitional year,” adding that the company now expects profitability in the second half.

title: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Reports Q4 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: Royal Caribbean (RCL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -29.19% and 13.66%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Royal Caribbean Q4 2021 Earnings Report Recap
text: Royal Caribbean's (RCL) Q4 loss was larger than expected, while revenue was lower than estimated. Its occupancy rate also missed estimates.

title: Is Royal Caribbean Stock A Buy At $80?
text: Royal Caribbean stock (NYSE: RCL), the second-largest cruise line operator in the U.S., remains up by roughly 1% so far this year, compared to the broader S&P 500 which remains down by about 5% over the same period. The outperformance comes as investors likely believe.

title: Royal Caribbean stock falls after wider-than-expected loss, another revenue miss
text: Shares of Royal Caribbean Group RCL, -2.31% fell 1.5% in premarket trading Friday, after the cruise operator reported a wider-than-expected fourth-quarter loss and revenue that missed expectations again, as the omicron variant of the coronavirus that causes COVID-19 led to cruise cancellations and service disruptions. The net loss narrowed to $1.36 billion, or $5.33 a share, from $1.37 billion, or $6.09 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Royal Caribbean says Omicron will delay return to profitability
text: (Reuters) -Royal Caribbean Group said on Friday that the spread of the Omicron coronavirus variant would delay its return to profitability after missing estimates for fourth-quarter revenue.

title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP REPORTS ON 2021 RESULTS, PROVIDES BUSINESS UPDATE
text: MIAMI, Feb. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) today reported financial results for the 2021 fiscal year and provided business updates.  "2021 marked the beginning of our return to our mission of delivering the very best vacation experiences," said Jason Liberty, president and chief executive officer of the Royal Caribbean Group.

title: Royal Caribbean Earnings: What to Look For
text: Royal Caribbean (RCL) reports Q4 earnings on the morning of Feb. 4. Can the company's revenue and occupancy rate fully recover from the pandemic shock?

title: Earnings Outlook: Royal Caribbean may finally be confident enough to provide long-term financial guidance
text: Royal Caribbean Group looks poised to report the first billion-dollar quarter since the pandemic, and may finally be confident enough about the post-pandemic outlook to provide long-term financial targets.

title: NEW-LUXURY CELEBRITY CRUISES BRINGS HOTELS BY CELEBRITY TO GUESTS WHO WANT TO EXTEND THEIR VACATIONS BEFORE AND AFTER THEIR SAILINGS
text: MIAMI, Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, new-luxury cruise brand Celebrity Cruises ® announced a new program designed to offer confidence and ease when guests sailing want to add a pre- and post-cruise land experience. The newly launched Hotels by Celebrity℠ offers guests sailing with Celebrity a curated list of 4- and 5-star hotels at exclusive rates, creating a streamlined and stress-free experience when planning cruise vacations.

title: Why Carnival and Other Cruise Stocks Lagged the Market Today

text: When the pandemic becomes endemic, worrying about future cruise bans could become academic.

title: Factors Setting the Tone for Royal Caribbean (RCL) Q4 Earnings
text: Royal Caribbean's (RCL) fourth-quarter performance is likely to have benefitted from pent-up demand, improved booking trends and new ship additions.
